title: 9 herbal teas for runners with knee swelling
description: Salix alba essential oils, also known as white willow bark oil, has anti-inflammatory properties that can help with knee swelling. The oil contains a compound called salicin, which is similar to aspirin and helps to reduce pain and inflammation. It also contains flavonoids and polyphenols, which have antioxidant properties that can help to protect the body from damage and promote healing.
